CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GANJI, GREG, DR. YANG, SUZY, DR. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CLASSIC DENTAL ARTS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-27-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
